assignment_prompt: Write an opinion essay about whether universities should keep online learning after the pandemic.
essay_text_anonymized: Online learning gives students more freedom because they can review lectures at home and save time from traveling. However, some students lose attention when the class is only online, and they have fewer chances to discuss ideas face to face. I think universities should keep online learning, but teachers must make it more interactive. For example, teachers can use short quizzes and group discussion to help students stay active. In this way, online learning can become a useful choice instead of a weak replacement for classroom study.

assignment_prompt: Write an argumentative paragraph about the influence of social media on teenagers.
essay_text_anonymized: Social media helps teenagers communicate with friends and learn about the world. It can also make students compare their lives with others too much. Some young people spend many hours online and lose focus on study. Schools should teach students how to use it carefully instead of only saying it is bad. If teenagers learn to control their time, social media can be a helpful tool.

assignment_prompt: Write a problem-solution essay about environmental protection in cities.
essay_text_anonymized: Many cities face air pollution, plastic waste, and traffic problems. The government should improve public transport and encourage recycling, but citizens also need to change small habits. For example, people can bring reusable bags and use fewer private cars. These actions may look small, but they can reduce waste and make the city cleaner. Environmental protection needs cooperation between public policy and daily life.
